title: metastelma astephanoides
intro: Metastelma astephanoides is a species of flowering plant in the dogbane family, Apocynaceae, known for its unique appearance and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Metastelma astephanoides has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, preventing infection, and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion, and can also be used in the form of a paste or poultice for topical application.
